skill_changes.reason: Original docs referenced ~/.openclaw/skills; the benchmark injects skills at /root/skills, so examples and helper script messages were aligned to the injected runtime path.

Replaces the prior markdown-convert injection (URL→markdown converter, useless when sources are already local md). Provides a five-phase RCA framework that maps cleanly onto the cross-incident root-cause synthesis required by this task. Added a 'cross-incident application' section that adapts the framework to multiple postmortems.

Replaces the prior cognitive-memory injection (multi-store agent memory with reflection cycles, weak fit for merging six local postmortem md files). markdown-formatter directly supports producing the four-section insights.md the prompt asks for.

Adds a fourth skill so the task retains skill-density parity. The original skill produces digests of decisions/lessons/actions/questions from dated memory files; the cross-incident postmortem synthesis maps to the same four buckets, so a 'cross-incident application' section was added to make the mapping explicit. No upstream behavior was rewritten.
